reference: If the patient has hepatitis C and there is a lump in the liver, it might be progressing towards cirrhosis. If a patient is immunocompromised and there is a severe infection along with an electrolyte imbalance, then the prognosis is usually not good.
text: If the patient has hepatite C and there is a lump in the liver, it might be progressing towards cirrhosis. If a patient is immunocompromised and there is a severe infection along with an electrolyte imbalance, then the prognosis is usually not good.
